description: Make inbound admin messages attach to the most recent unfinished thread instead of only reusing queued threads.

userStories.title: Route inbound messages to unfinished threads
userStories.description: As a developer, I want thread routing to reuse the most recent unfinished thread for the same sender so that follow-up admin messages stay attached to the active conversation.
acceptanceCriteria: routeThread reuses queued threads for the same fromUserId
routeThread reuses waiting_approval threads for the same fromUserId
routeThread does not reuse done threads
When multiple unfinished threads exist, routeThread returns the most recent unfinished thread
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Cover unfinished-thread reuse in TaskService
userStories.description: As a developer, I want TaskService receiveMessage behavior covered by tests so that waiting-approval threads are reused and done threads start new work.
acceptanceCriteria: A second message from the same admin reuses a waiting_approval thread
A second message after markDone creates a new thread instead of reusing the finished one
TaskService tests use the public receiveMessage, markWaitingApproval, and markDone API
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Verify SQLite-backed thread attachment behavior
userStories.description: As a developer, I want composed entrypoint coverage for repository-backed thread reuse so that SQLite persistence stays aligned with the unfinished-thread routing contract.
acceptanceCriteria: SQLite-backed composition reuses the same thread after markWaitingApproval for a second message from the same user
Repository-backed verification stays limited to thread attachment behavior
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Run slice verification suite
userStories.description: As a developer, I want focused and full verification for the thread attach slice so that the routing change is proven without regressing unrelated behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Run vitest for thread-router, service, and entrypoint coverage with all tests passing
Run the full vitest suite with all tests passing
Run TypeScript typecheck with no errors
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
